ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the publication was published */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the publication appeared */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations the publication has received */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the publication */,
  "publication_type" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., article, conference paper, book chapter) */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Sources of funding for the publication */,
  "research_areas" TEXT /* Specific research areas or topics covered in the publication */,
  "is_peer_reviewed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the publication has undergone peer review */,
  "open_access" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the publication is open access */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the publication is written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "venue_type" TEXT /* Type of venue (e.g., journal, conference, book) */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the venue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the venue */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) for journals */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the venue */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Publication frequency (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the author belongs to */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* Open Researcher and Contributor ID (ORCID) of the author */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* H-index of the author */,
  "research_areas" TEXT /* Research areas or topics the author specializes in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "pa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication-author relationship */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the publication */,
  "corresponding_author" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the author is the corresponding author */,
  "contribution_percentage" REAL /* Percentage contribution of each author to the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_authors_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the department was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications_departments" (
  "pd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication-department relationship */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_departments_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_departments_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user (e.g., professor, assistant, researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the publication */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the publication */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation relationship */,
  "citing_publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication that cites another publication */,
  "cited_publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being cited */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation (e.g., direct, indirect, self-citation) */,
  "citation_context" TEXT /* Context in which the citation was made (e.g., introduction, methodology, conclusion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_cited_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_citing_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("citing_publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication version */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the publication */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path or URL of the publication version */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* File size of the publication version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, final, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_versions_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)
